Video.summary: Tony suspects the head of a shelter is murdering young runaways; Rachel takes an out-of-town job.
Video.title: Suffer The Children, Part 1

Video.summary: When the majority of Tony's officers stage a sick-out in the wake of a wage dispute, Eastbridge becomes an open city for crime.
Video.title: Blue Flu

Video.summary: Tony sets out to trap a serial rapist whose victims are young blind women. Meanwhile, Rachel makes a surprising investment in art.
Video.title: Sight Unseen

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: The Anti-Commish

Video.summary: Stella Stevens guest stars as a reclusive former movie queen -- and one of Tony's all-time fim favorites -- who is implicated in the real-life murder of her lover.
Video.title: Eastbridge Boulevard

Video.summary: When Reno learns of the escape of a convicted killer, he heads for Chicago to protect the arresting officer, his father, Police Sergeant Doug Raines
Video.title: Windy City Blues

Video.summary: When a distinguished municipal judge awakes after an intimate evening to find his "date" murdered during the night, he must pay the price to the club owner who is willing to help him cover up the incident.
Video.title: Honor Bound

Video.summary: When a UNLV coed is kidnapped following a frat party, Bobby is hired by her father to deliver the two million dollar ransom and ensure the 18-year-old honor student's safe return.
Video.title: Hard Rider

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy disagree over a psychic who claims to have knowledge of a murder.
Video.title: A Question of Faith

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate the murder of a popular Cuban businessman.
Video.title: Fevers

Video.summary: As he and Cassy investigate the mysterious death of a newlywed couple, Tom seeks advice on gening back into the dating game.
Video.title: Guilt By Association

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy are called in to investigate the mysterious deaths of a wealthy woman's pets.
Video.title: Night Of The Parrot

Video.summary: Rita and Chris are not quite convinced that a double murder in a hairstyling salon is a mob hit.
Video.title: Blo-Dri

Video.summary: Lance and Lorenzo look beyond the bedside manner of a young society doctor when he is brutally murdered.
Video.title: Intensive Care

Video.summary: Rita is stunned when her ex, a major league player, is suspected of murdering a club owner.
Video.title: Squeeze Play

Video.summary: Rita and Chris probe a fan who admits to killing the girlfriend of a brash radio star.
Video.title: Shock Jock

Video.summary: A commander kills his wifeĺs lover, then frames Chris and Rita by manipulating a D.A. and evidence.
Video.title: Witness

Video.summary: Chris is suspended for shooting an unarmed thief as the victimĺs mother plots unexpected revenge.
Video.title: Domestic Agenda

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy's investigation of an FBI agent's murder is hampered by a pair of secretive and uncooperative federal agents.
Video.title: Ladies Man

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate the death of a prep school student whose blackmail scheme led to his murder.
Video.title: Dirty Little Secret

Video.summary: Reno and Bobby get more than they gambled for when they head to Las Vegas in pursuit of an escaped bank robber suffering from multiple personalities.
Video.title: Cop For A Day

Video.summary: Bobby gets a new lesson in fear when he heads up to Santa Barbara State College after a serial killer responsible for the disappearance of 5 coeds.
Video.title: Stalker's Moon

Video.summary: Reno tackles a new profession while trying to flush out the killer of 3 "Repo Men".
Video.title: Repo Raines

Video.summary: Reno attempts to capture a murderer while meeting with a local Real Estate dealer, which results in the real estate dealer's death during a gunfire exchange.
Video.title: Ace In The Hole

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a precarious situation when he becomes the latest target of a bounty hunter known as a "living legend" as well as Bobby's teacher and mentor.
Video.title: Living Legend

Video.summary: Reno finds his patience tested while attempting to protect a wealthy socialite and murder witness.
Video.title: Family Ties

Video.summary: Reno gets a new view of "the road" when a country singer solicits his help after a series of mysterious incidents lead the Renegade to suspect that her life is in danger.
Video.title: Broken On The Wheel Of Love

Image.alt: Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love
Broken On The Wheel Of Love
